clips_music_attribution_info.song_name: Chupke Chupke Raat Din Aansoon Bahanayaad Hai

node.text: 😂😂😂😂 ahhhh!!!!!! Hope he doesn't have oil, or else US will invade him too....🤐😬
I also have stone in kidney 😂
@zen_it_services hahahahah well well don’t even go into those details 😂
Sorry bro but I kept on reading and it just kept on getting better 😂😂😂
🤣🤣🤣 I hope you have the mining rights for all that 'silver', 'gas' and 'gold'!"🤣🤣
Can't stop laughing, god bless u guys
I am glad this song found you too ❤️
Me in the line to be rich but not looking for crystals though....😂😂😂
Just wondering does he follow your account? Or blocked?😂
